sota_findings.memory: Tripartite model: Working, Episodic, Semantic. Use Knowledge Graphs for semantic retrieval.
sota_findings.reasoning: Process-oriented memory. Store reasoning trajectories, not just results.
sota_findings.orchestration: Multi-agent ecologies with internal debate/critic phases.
sota_findings.training: Test-time learning and policy-group adaptation without retraining weights.

logic_upgrade: Add a 'Reflection' block to AgentRuntime. Each thought must be verified by a Critic sub-agent.
